creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
Hi,

since about 12.2-BETA1 the x11-fm/caja file manager crashes quite frequently. Before that it run very stable.

How can I help to track the issue?

% uname -a
FreeBSD w520.local 12.2-RC1 FreeBSD 12.2-RC1 r366352 GENERIC  amd64

% pkg info | grep caja
caja-1.24.0                    File manager for the MATE desktop

% grep latest /etc/pkg/FreeBSD.conf
  url: "pkg+http://pkg.FreeBSD.org/${ABI}/latest",

Regards.
